text:
There once was a tiny mouse who lived in a flower bed. This little mouse loved exploring the outdoors.

One sunny day, he discovered an old mailbox on wheels. It was lonely because nobody ever mailed anything there.

Instead of mailing anything, the mouse decided to write letters. Each day, he wrote little notes full of friendship and adventures. One note said, "Just wait here, I'll find someone special!"

After weeks of waiting, another creature moved into the area—a majestic owl. Owl had beautiful feathers and incredible sight.

The mouse couldn veel EVER forget owl's gaze? Owl perched silently, then fluttered down to admire the tiny friend. "You could turn into my mail carrier," Owl sighed.

The mouse clucked happily. He became owl's magical messenger! They exchanged stories and dreams every day.

One night, owl told mouse of far-away places. The mouse imagined flying across oceans and mountains.

With owl's guidance, the mouse mastered some gentle tricks. Together they
